# Low Salinity

**Summary**: The use of water with lower salt content to improve oil recovery.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-dafaalla|Dafaalla, 2023]] evaluated the synergistic effect of low salinity and viscoelastic polymers on carbonate reservoirs.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-dafaalla|Dafaalla, 2023]] Used to alter rock wettability and improve mobility.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-dafaalla|Dafaalla, 2023]] Measured via water chemistry analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Low salinity can enhance EOR efficiency, particularly when combined with high concentrations of sulfate ions. ([[2023-dafaalla|Dafaalla, 2023, p. 49]])
- [[2023-dafaalla|Dafaalla, 2023]] Not specified.
